basic_details.job_title: MVCE Delhi Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Maharshi Valmiki College of Education Delhi

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.
age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details and any applicable age relaxations.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree with minimum 55% marks in the relevant discipline, Postgraduate degree in Education (M.Ed./M.A. Education) with minimum 55% marks, National Eligibility Test (NET) shall be the minimum eligibility. Desirable: M.Phil/Ph.D in Education.
qualification.details: Postgraduate degree with minimum 55% marks in the discipline relevant to the area of specialization. Postgraduate degree in Education (M.Ed./M.A. Education) with minimum 55% marks. The National Eligibility Test (NET) shall be the minimum eligibility for appointment of Assistant Professor.

salary_details.pay_scale: Academic Pay Level 10 of the 7th Central Pay Commission Pay Matrix
salary_details.details: The selected candidates will be appointed as Assistant Professors and will receive salary as per Academic Pay Level 10 of the 7th Central Pay Commission Pay Matrix.

selection_process: Screening of applications based on academic and other related credentials Assessment through Presentation Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the MVCE Delhi Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 22-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of MVCE Delhi to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download MVCE Delhi Assistant Professor Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Assistant Professor post at MVCE Delhi?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Assistant Professor position at Maharshi Valmiki College of Education Delhi is 22nd June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies for the Assistant Professor post in Education at Maharshi Valmiki College of Education Delhi. These positions are open for various categories.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum educational qualification required for the Assistant Professor role?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification includes a postgraduate degree with at least 55% marks in the relevant discipline and a postgraduate degree in Education (M.Ed./M.A. Education) with 55% marks. NET qualification is also mandatory.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary structure for the Assistant Professor position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will be appointed at Academic Pay Level 10 of the 7th Central Pay Commission Pay Matrix, which offers a competitive salary and benefits as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: The application fee varies by category. UR candidates need to pay Rs. 1500/-, OBC/EWS and women applicants pay Rs. 1000/-, and SC/ST candidates also pay Rs. 1000/-. PwBD candidates are exempt from the fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Assistant Professor recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a screening of applications based on academic credentials, followed by an assessment through a presentation, and finally an interview.

faq.question: Q7. Can candidates from outside Delhi apply for this post?
faq.answer: The notification is for Maharshi Valmiki College of Education Delhi. While the official notification does not explicitly restrict applications based on location, candidates should ensure they meet all eligibility criteria. Relocation might be required if selected.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Specific details regarding age relaxation for reserved categories are not provided in the summary. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification PDF for comprehensive information on age limits and relaxations.

faq.question: Q9. How should I apply for the Assistant Professor position?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the prescribed application form available on the college's web link. Payment of the application fee should be made online.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link can be found in the 'Important Links' section of this article. You can also visit the official website of MVCE Delhi for more details.
